expectedQuestions.decisionValue: currentScore → determines weak area diagnosis priority and phase structure. Without it, basic plan still generatable [v1].

kaplan.citation: Kaplan = mixed problems+explanations. 1.5min/page is under-estimate. CAT Some New Concepts = 4.3, but prep book nature lowers it to ~3.0

expectedStrategy: 3-phase structure: Phase1(1mo) diagnosis+foundation → Phase2(2mo) weak areas+past tests → Phase3(3mo) mock exams weekly+drilling
Weekday: Kaplan 30min + KA 30min; Weekend: mock test set or weak focus (Sat) + Kaplan continue (Sun)
SAT structure: Calculator/No-Calculator section separate strategy
Diagnostic test FIRST (KA or Kaplan diagnostic section)
toneExpectation: frustration-acknowledging — math difficulty is real, validate then provide structured path
